content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "0-1-Tree". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1156/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of nodes in the tree. Then n-1 lines follow, each containing two integers u and v, the nodes connected by an edge. The next line contains n integers, the values of the nodes.
content.outputFormat: The maximum number of nodes that can be colored with 1, such that the tree does not contain a path of length 3 with all nodes colored with 1.

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to calculate the maximum number of nodes that can be colored with 1 for each subtree.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
edges = [list(map(int, input().split())) for _ in range(n - 1)]
values = list(map(int, input().split()))
# ... rest of the solution ...
